Title: Mediterranean Tomato Landraces Exhibit Genotype-Specific Transcriptomic Responses to Water Stress.
Summary: This study compares the transcriptomic responses of four tomato genotypes (two landraces and two commercial varieties) under well-watered and water stress conditions using RNA-Seq in leaf and root tissues. It highlights genotype-specific and tissue-dependent differential gene expression patterns associated with drought tolerance.
